logo.tagline: Own a team. Compete with your crew.

footer.description: FanQuin turns every matchday into a shared ritual with private groups, team ownership, rivalry resets, and live ranking swings.

hero.title: Own teams. Predict matches. Dominate the leaderboard.
hero.description: Start a quiniela with friends, family, classmates, or coworkers in minutes. Pick scores, own national teams, unlock boosts, and watch the rivalry unfold in real time. FanQuin launches with the FIFA World Cup 2026 and expands into every major league and sport.

pillars.title: Your own quiniela, in minutes
pillars.description: Create a private group, invite friends or family, and start predicting match scores right away. No spreadsheets, no confusion.

pillars.title: Own a national team
pillars.description: Snake draft or random assignment gives every player a flag to fight for — your team's wins score you points all tournament long.

pillars.title: Rivalry that stings
pillars.description: Weekly 1v1 matchups and live leaderboard swings keep every player emotionally invested, even when the season table stretches.

pillars.title: Boosts and streaks
pillars.description: Underdog boosts, double-point tokens, and streak rewards give every matchday a fresh reason to care.

groupModes.title: Casual — Friends & Family

scoringLayers.title: Prediction accuracy

scoringLayers.title: Ownership rewards

scoringLayers.description: Low-percentage picks pay more so groups do not converge into safe, boring choices.

index.retentionSection: Built to go viral in your group chat

engagementLoops.title: Share in one tap
engagementLoops.description: Private invite links work straight from WhatsApp, iMessage, or any group chat. No app download required to join.

engagementLoops.title: Every matchday is a new story
engagementLoops.description: Upset bonuses, leaderboard flips, and streak breaks generate shareable moments that pull everyone back into the chat.

engagementLoops.title: No one gets left behind
engagementLoops.description: Weekly resets and micro-win rewards keep trailing players engaged all tournament long — even from last place.

productDirection.title: Start with the World Cup. Stay for every league that follows.
productDirection.description: FanQuin launches with FIFA World Cup 2026 and expands into Champions League, Premier League, Liga MX, NBA, and more. The same social engine — predictions, ownership, rivalries, boosts — powers every competition.

values.title: 🏆 Own your team
values.description: Every player gets a national team to cheer for. Your team's goals and wins are your points.

values.title: ⚔️ Weekly rivalries
values.description: 1v1 matchups reset every week. Even last place can get revenge — and the group chat knows it.

values.title: 🔥 Streaks & boosts
values.description: Consecutive correct picks unlock power-ups. Timed tokens and underdog boosts create real comeback windows.

values.title: 🌍 Any group, any size
values.description: 2-player showdowns to 100-person classrooms. Game rules automatically adapt to your group size.

placeholder.routeExpand: Next pass can expand this route without changing the navigation structure.

groups.title: Create, join, and scale custom prediction circles
groups.description: This route is already wired into the shared FanQuin shell. Next pass can expand group setup, invite permissions, and configurable game modes without changing the navigation structure.
highlights: Configurable scoring packs for small, medium, and large groups.
Invite-first growth with private links, reminders, and waitlists.
Draft setup entry point for snake order or random team assignment.

live.title: Real-time match pulse is ready for deeper buildout
live.description: Use this route next for live notifications, minute-by-minute swings, and richer what-if scenarios tied to real event data.
highlights: Rank movement stream after every goal, card, or final whistle.
Scenario simulator to compare possible outcomes before they happen.
Notification-ready structure for deadline and rivalry alerts.

scoring.title: The scoring system is modular by design
scoring.description: This route can evolve into the detailed scoring builder, showing how exact scores, ownership, streaks, and boosts combine per group mode.
highlights: Rule templates for tournament pools, survivor modes, and league play.
Transparent breakdown of every point won or lost per match.
Admin controls to tune upset rewards and power-up availability.

groupPage.settingsSubtitle: Update your group details. Only available before the draft starts.
groupPage.settingsSaveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
groupPage.settingsLockedHint: Settings can only be changed while the group is waiting.
groupPage.noScores: No scores yet. Predictions start once the tournament begins.
groupPage.notFound: Group not found or you are not a member.
groupPage.startGroupConfirm: This will begin the draft phase. Members will be able to pick teams. Continue?
groupPage.startError: Failed to start group. Please try again.

statusHint.waiting: Invite members, then start the draft when everyone is in.
statusHint.draft: Snake draft is open — members are picking teams.
statusHint.active: Competition is live! Predict matches to earn points.

groupPage.snakeExplainIntro: Every member picks exactly one team per round. The pick order "snakes" back and forth so no one always picks first or last.
groupPage.snakeExplainRule1: Odd rounds (1, 3, 5…): picks flow in order — 1st, 2nd, 3rd…
groupPage.snakeExplainRule2: Even rounds (2, 4, 6…): the order reverses — last, second-to-last…
groupPage.snakeExplainRule3: This repeats until every team has been assigned.
groupPage.snakeExplainExRow1: Round 1 →   A picks · B picks · C picks
groupPage.snakeExplainExRow2: Round 2 ↩   C picks · B picks · A picks
groupPage.snakeExplainExRow3: Round 3 →   A picks · B picks · C picks
groupPage.snakeExplainFair: The player who picks last in one round picks first in the next — eliminating any permanent positional advantage.

draft.title: Draft Room
draft.confirmPickBody: Once confirmed you cannot change your pick.
draft.pickError: Could not submit pick. Try again.
draft.draftCompleteBody: All teams have been assigned. The competition is now live!

join.signInBody: You need an account to join this group. Sign in or create one — it only takes a minute.
join.invalid: This invite link is invalid or has expired.
join.error: Could not join. Please try again.
